texts.text: This file adds activity filtering, sorting, and author/change-type listing to HistoryService. Look at the new query records and how ProjectActivity now applies filters and paging.
Adds a ChangeTypes array computed from distinct change type keys per commit.
Rewritten to take a query, apply filters and sort, and page with Skip/Take.
Empty filter arrays return no commits; author keys split into ids, names, and unknown.
Synced sort orders use json_extract of SyncDate with nulls pushed last.
JS-invokable wrapper over the history service; look at the new filter and sort parameters on ProjectActivity and the two new list methods.
ProjectActivity gains author, change-type, and sort params and passes them via ActivityQuery.
Registers new activity types for TypeScript generation. Check that the added types and the ActivitySort enum match the new backend history API.
The activity endpoint now takes filter and sort query params, and two new list endpoints back the filter options. Check the defaults and how the query is passed on.
Adds /authors and /change-types routes and wraps filter/sort args in an ActivityQuery.
New helper module for activity filtering: constants, filter types, and pure functions for select/query state. Check the multi-select and server-query logic.
Defines the sentinel keys, filter types, and default load/filter shapes used across the activity views.
Handles clicking the "all" key: toggles between empty and 'all', else keeps or collapses the picked keys.
This service drops the fetch fallbacks and now calls the JS history API directly. Look at the new activity filter methods.
Removes the DEV code that randomly returned undefined.
The old activity() method is replaced here by listActivityAuthors().
New ActivityFilter component: builds author and change-type multi-select filters plus a sort menu, bound to a filters prop. Look at how selections resolve and update filter keys.
Loads authors and change types via resources, then derives select values and sort labels.
Picks check, minus, or no icon based on whether all, some, or none are selected.
Rewrites activity loading to use server-side filters and paged queries with a query key. Look at how stale results are guarded and how filters reset pageCount.
Switches from projectCode/loadCount to filters, pageCount, and a query key; check the stale-data guards.
New effects pick a selected row, auto-fetch more pages when few rows pass filters, and reset pageCount.
New error, loading, and empty states; adds an unsynced-changes icon and unknown-author fallback.
Converts this dialog to Svelte 5 runes and adds a bindable selectedCommitId prop; record is now derived from it instead of stored.
Reactive statements move into an $effect; record becomes $derived from selectedCommitId and history.
First commit is only selected when nothing is already selected.
ActivityItem now also passes changeTypes: [].
This select item now takes an optional `selectedIndicator` snippet to override the default check icon. Look at the new Props type and the render fallback.
This file styles the select trigger. Look at the new class list entry on the trigger element.
The dotnet service proxy now wraps the method call in a try/catch. Check that the error is logged and rethrown, not swallowed.
Adds translation strings for the activity filter and view — activity types, authors, sort options, and error/empty states. Check the new msgids match the UI.
"No activity found" is dropped and "No activity matches these filters" now appears twice in a row here.

gate.note: provisional and directional (one subject): the human read-through is the other gate half and is NOT reflected here — Tim reading narrated-vs-bare is required before default-on

metadata.note: single-family judge (Claude): self-preference caveat applies; generator/judge ids must differ where possible
